title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Adda247 - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Adda247:
Adda247 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247!
